scripts.check:quality: pnpm check:inventory && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test:coverage && pnpm check:migrations && pnpm build:ci
scripts.test:coverage: vitest run --config vitest.exhaustive.config.ts --coverage --reporter=default --reporter=json --outputFile.json=coverage/vitest-results.json && node scripts/check-vitest-result.mjs coverage/vitest-results.json
scripts.lint: biome lint demo/ tests/ scripts/ playwright.config.ts vitest.exhaustive.config.ts
scripts.lint:fix: biome lint --write demo/ tests/ scripts/ playwright.config.ts vitest.exhaustive.config.ts
scripts.format: biome format --write demo/ tests/ scripts/ playwright.config.ts vitest.exhaustive.config.ts
scripts.check: pnpm check:secrets && pnpm check:quality && pnpm check:runtime
scripts.check:fast: pnpm check:secrets && pnpm check:inventory && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck
